audience.description: Learners prepared for calculus-level work who want an integrated computational path through continuous, discrete, stochastic, optimization, and research-grade modeling.
entryKnowledge: Complete Intermediate Applied Mathematics or demonstrate algebra, trigonometry, probability, matrices, statistics, and Python numerical computing.
deviceConstraints: Desktop strongly recommended; browser Python supports core work while optional local NumPy and SciPy environments support extended projects.
accessibilityAssumptions: All equations, diagrams, tables, terminal traces, and code examples require equivalent structured text and full keyboard operation.

placementEvidence: A placement review or prior artifact must demonstrate this entry skill: Complete Intermediate Applied Mathematics or demonstrate algebra, trigonometry, probability, matrices, statistics, and Python numerical computing.
completionEvidence: Complete and defend all 4 stakeholder projects against their acceptance constraints and rubrics.
Pass the cumulative performance examination at or above 85 percent with changed-case evidence.

includes: Single and multivariable calculus with applications
Linear algebra, differential equations, probability, statistics, and optimization
Numerical methods, PDEs, signals, operations research, and reproducible modeling

sources.title: OpenStax Calculus Volumes 1 through 3
sources.scope: Controls calculus scope and prerequisite order across single and multivariable topics.

sources.title: SIAM Applied Mathematics Program Report
sources.scope: Controls integrated applied, computational, industry, research, and communication outcomes.

sources.title: NumPy Documentation
sources.scope: Controls array, linear algebra, random, Fourier, and numerical implementation practice.

sources.title: SciPy Documentation
sources.scope: Controls numerical integration, optimization, interpolation, differential equations, and scientific validation APIs.

learningDesign.retainedPractice: Retrieve and correctly reuse math-adv-identifiability, math-adv-model-governance, math-adv-multivariable-functions, math-adv-derivative-rules, math-adv-fundamental-theorem, math-adv-partial-derivatives, math-adv-vector-field-theorems, math-adv-rank-nullspace, math-adv-orthogonality-qr, math-adv-second-order-odes, math-adv-phase-portraits, math-adv-feedback-control, math-adv-markov-chains, math-adv-bayesian-models, math-adv-root-finding, math-adv-direct-iterative-solvers, math-adv-automatic-differentiation, math-adv-finite-difference-pde, math-adv-sampling-aliasing, math-adv-integer-programming, math-adv-research-question, math-adv-reproducible-release before adding or assessing the changed requirement.
learningDesign.learnerArtifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs.

projects.title: Energy Demand and Storage Dynamics
projects.userNeed: The team needs a calibrated dynamic storage model with unit, solver, and uncertainty evidence.
constraints: Every input, assumption, transformation, and result is traceable.
Invalid, boundary, and changed cases are tested instead of silently discarded.
The result is understandable and useful to its named stakeholder.
